title: Bit Tweaks
description: A Craftbukkit 1060 plugin that changes some mechanics and fixes some issues with b1.7.3!
body:
A somewhat lightweight plugin that changes some mechanics and fixes some issues on b1.7.3. Everything is configurable!

### Available tweaks:
1. Fix Slime Split `fixSlimeSplit`  
1. Disable sleeping (Also won't set spawnpoint) `disableSleeping`  
1. Fix pig saddles not dropping `fixPigSaddle`  
1. Disable Pigmen from dropping cooked porkchop `disablePigZombieDrops`  
1. Make gold pickaxes act like they have Silk Touch `silkyGoldenPickaxe`  
1. Make bone meal be used on sheep or sugar cane `bonemealOnSheep` & `canBonemealSugarcane`  
1. Restore Alpha's TNT `alphaTNT`  
1. Fix MLGs `fixWaterFallDmg` & `fixCobwebFallDmg`  
  
With more to come...!
